channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: I'm slashing my streaming bills by 56% in 2026 – here's my five-step masterplan
item.description: Five ways to cut the cost of Netflix, Disney+ and more by selectively subscribing and cutting unnecessary options.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: 4 mandates for CIOs to bridge the AI trust gap
item.description: For the third consecutive year, the Thinkers360 AI Trust Index has taken the pulse of sentiment toward AI, and the results, once again, are a stark reminder to CIOs and CXOs that the technological innovation curve continues to outpace the ethical and governance structure required to support it.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to watch Call the Midwife 2025 Christmas specials online
item.description: With time running out, the Nonnatus head on a rescue mission to Hong Kong. Here's how to watch the Call the Widwife 2025 Christmas specials online anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: Harmonizing compliance: How oversight modernization can strengthen America’s cyber resilience
item.description: Compliance alone won’t suffice if agencies continue to interpret and implement critical infrastructure security mandates in isolation. The post Harmonizing compliance: How oversight modernization can strengthen America’s cyber resilience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Waymo to begin testing robotaxis in more Bay Area cities
item.description: Driverless vehicles no longer exist solely in spy movies and futuristic dreams. In fact, Solano County streets are one step closer to a future that features these self-driving “robotaxis.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Rodriguez, The Mercury News

item.title: Pro-Russian hackers claim cyberattack on French postal service
item.description: French prosecutors say a pro-Russian hacking group has claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack on France’s national postal service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Get started with Python’s new native JIT
item.description: JITing, or “just-in-time” compilation, can make relatively slow interpreted languages much faster. Until recently, JITting was available for Python only in the form of specialized third-party libraries, like Numba, or alternate versions of the Python interpreter, like PyPy.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Deno adds tool to run NPM and JSR binaries
item.description: Deno 2.6, the latest version of the TypeScript, JavaScript, and WebAssembly runtime, adds a tool, called dx, to run binaries from NPM and JSR (JavaScript Registry) packages. The update to the Node.js rival was announced December 10; installation instructions can be found at docs.deno.com.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Rust vision group seeks enumeration of language design goals
item.description: To help the Rust language continue scaling across domains and usage levels, the Rust Vision Doc group recommends enumerating the design goals for evolving the language while also improving the crates package system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OPM to hire critic of HR consolidation plan
item.description: Don Bauer, the former CTO at the State Department’s Bureau of Global Talent Management, is returning to government to lead the HR modernization effort. The post OPM to hire critic of HR consolidation plan first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Google sues data scraping company
item.description: Google is now suing US data scraping company Serpapi for using hundreds of millions of fake search queries to bypass Google’s protection system and illegally obtain copyrighted material from search results, Reuters reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Global uncertainty is reshaping cloud strategies in Europe
item.description: When Austria’s Ministry of Economy, Energy, and Tourism set out to replace Skype for Business as its virtual meeting platform, Microsoft Teams was the obvious choice.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 8 old programming languages developers won’t quit
item.description: The computer revolution has always been driven by the new and the next. The hype-mongers have trained us to assume that the latest iteration of ideas will be the next great leap forward. Some, though, are quietly stepping off the hype train.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Starlink in the crosshairs: How Russia could attack Elon Musk's conquering of space
item.description: NATO-nation intelligence services believe Russia is developing a weapon to target Starlink satellites.
item.dc:creator: John Leicester, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Instagram’s new AI tool lets you control your algorithm
item.description: Instagram's new 'Your Algorithm' tool lets you control your Reels feed in real time. The app now gives you power to customize what videos you see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
